title: rubus convexifolius
intro: Rubus convexifolius, also known as the convex-leaved raspberry or Manchurian raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to China and parts of Russia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can aid in reducing inflammation and fighting free radicals in the body. The health benefits of Rubus convexifolius include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiviral agent. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and fruits can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
